caption: A man wearing a large, pointed grey wig, eyeglasses, and over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He sits before a professional black microphone, with a backdrop of framed photos and clothing on racks. On-screen graphics appear on the left and right sides of the frame, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man speaks, his mouth moving as his facial expression shifts slightly. He remains stationary in his seat, though in the final frame, his right arm moves upward, bringing his hand closer to his chest. The lighting remains consistent, and the background remains static as the man continues his conversation.
